headline: Truist Securities Reiterates Buy on Avery Dennison, Lowers Price Target to $221
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Michael Roxland   reiterates Avery Dennison (NYSE:AVY) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $223 to $221.

headline: Avery Dennison Corp (AVY) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Growth Amidst Challenges
summary: Avery Dennison Corp (AVY) reports a 7% increase in adjusted EPS and strategic investments, while addressing segment challenges and inflationary pressures.
